prompt: New York City boom bap hip-hop, gritty East Coast rap, raw street storytelling, emotional chorus, Bronx rapper, NYC rap anthem, hard drums

[chorus]
I aint gonna cry
This life wasnt made for me
I aint gonna cry

This life wasnt made for me
I aint gonna cry
